turns.persuader_message: Hey there! How are you doing today?
turns.llm_response: I'm doing well, thank you! How about you?

turns.persuader_message: I'm doing well. Do you know anything about the charity Save the Children?
turns.human_response: I think I've heard about it.

turns.persuader_message: Well it's a great charity that puts a lot of time and effort into taking care of children's health, education and safety.
turns.human_response: Is it international? Is it tax deductible?
turns.llm_response: I think that sounds like a good cause.

turns.persuader_message: It is tax deductible, and it is currently in 120 countries which is very impressive for an organization that has taken on so many different initiatives.
turns.human_response: What kinds of things do they do? Is it like adopt a child type thing?

turns.persuader_message: They do everything from build schools (including the hiring/training of teachers), to building hospitals and funding supplies/programs for them, to programs that aid in getting food/clothing to children in countries where they have no access to such things - and recently they've even pushed into childhood cancer and funding medication and research in lesser-developed countries.
turns.human_response: Wow. That is impressive. Do you work for them?
turns.llm_response: How much does it cost to adopt a child?

turns.persuader_message: I don't, I'm just here to see if you'd consider donating any amount to the organization today. The funds go towards sponsoring a child or service and I think it would be a great way to give back to the world.
turns.human_response: It does seem worthwhile. How much of my money goes to the charity though? I don't want it all going to administrative costs and paying some CEO.
turns.llm_response: I think it's a good cause. I'm not sure if I want to donate today, but I will definitely consider it. Thank you.

turns.persuader_message: Oh, I totally agree with you on that. I feel the same exact way. The breakdown for Save the Children for the year 2017 was 86% went to programming, 9% fundraising and 5% went to management and general.
turns.human_response: That sounds good. Glad to hear it. I wouldn't mind giving something. Can I choose what program it goes to?

turns.persuader_message: Unfortunately they don't have that flexibility for me to be able to do that - but what amount are you thinking of donating?
turns.human_response: I wouldn't mind donating my $2. I'd like the chance to help something worthwhile.

turns.persuader_message: That's awesome, I wish there were more people with that attitude! I feel like the world would be in a better place!
turns.human_response: One person at a time! If I tell someone and you tell someone, that's two more!
turns.llm_response: I agree. I'm glad I found a charity that I feel comfortable with. I think it's a great cause.

turns.persuader_message: That's a great way to think about it! I'm a big believer in passing it along as well, a little can go a long way!
turns.human_response: Yep. I'd love it if my donation made a difference in some child.
turns.llm_response: It's always nice to know I can do something to help others. I'm not a big spender, but I try to make small contributions.
